g.text: Train and held-out preference accuracy over 960 steps · UltraFeedback-binarized pairs, beta 0.5

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(107, 114, 128); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: Conclusion: train preference accuracy overfits toward 0.95, so the accepted checkpoint is chosen at the held-out peak
(step 600, 67.4%) — early stopping against DPO overfitting. Held-out still improves, modestly: +3.9 pp from the first eval.
